# ZebraCode - Free Online Developer Tools
> ZebraCode provides a collection of free, browser-based utilities for converting, formatting, and generating data. All tools process data locally.

## JSON Tools
- JSON Format: /json-format
- JSON to TypeScript: /json-to-typescript
- JSON to Go: /json-to-go
- JSON to Rust: /json-to-rust-serde
- JSON to Kotlin: /json-to-kotlin
- JSON to Java: /json-to-java
- JSON to YAML: /json-to-yaml
- JSON to TOML: /json-to-toml
- JSON to XML: (available via /xml-to-json reverse)
- JSON to CSV: /json-to-csv
- JSON to Zod: /json-to-zod

## CSS Tools
- CSS to JS: /css-to-js
- CSS to SCSS: /css-to-scss
- CSS to Tailwind: /css-to-tailwind
- SCSS to CSS: /scss-to-css

## GraphQL Tools
- GraphQL to TypeScript: /graphql-to-typescript
- GraphQL to Flow: /graphql-to-flow
- GraphQL to Java: /graphql-to-java
- GraphQL to MongoDB: /graphql-to-typescript-mongodb

## Generators
- Password Generator: /password-generator
- Lorem Ipsum Generator: /lorem-generator

## Text Tools
- Text Diff Checker: /text-diff
- Markdown to HTML: /markdown-to-html

## Other Tools
- Base64 Decode: /base64-decode
- JWT Decoder: /jwt-decoder
